---
name: performance-test
---

# Universal Performance Test Instructions

1. Use burst/concurrent requests (e.g., Promise.all) for peak load tests.
2. Use wave or ramp-up patterns for sustained load.
3. Collect metrics: total requests, successful responses, average duration.
4. Tag scenarios for performance or load (e.g., @Performance, @Load).
5. Analyze throughput and define success thresholds for any system.
